title: Login with Facebook - Positive Flow
test_steps: Open the Drug Index app. | Click on the Facebook login prompt. | Click on the 'CONTINUE AS SAM' button.
expected_result: The user is logged into the Drug Index app using their Facebook credentials.

title: Login with Facebook - Negative Flow - No Facebook Account
test_steps: Open the Drug Index app. | Click on the Facebook login prompt. | Click on the 'CONTINUE AS SAM' button.
expected_result: The app displays an error message indicating that the user does not have a Facebook account.

title: Login with Facebook - Negative Flow - Invalid Credentials
test_steps: Open the Drug Index app. | Click on the Facebook login prompt. | Enter invalid credentials in the Facebook login dialog. | Click on the 'CONTINUE AS SAM' button.
expected_result: The app displays an error message indicating that the credentials are invalid.

title: Login with Facebook - UI Test - Profile Picture Placeholder
test_steps: Open the Drug Index app. | Click on the Facebook login prompt. | Observe the profile picture placeholder.
expected_result: The profile picture placeholder is displayed correctly.

title: Login with Facebook - Accessibility Test
test_steps: Open the Drug Index app. | Click on the Facebook login prompt. | Perform a screen reader test on the 'CONTINUE AS SAM' button.
expected_result: The 'CONTINUE AS SAM' button is announced correctly by the screen reader.

title: Login with Facebook - Usability Test
test_steps: Open the Drug Index app. | Click on the Facebook login prompt. | Click on the 'CONTINUE AS SAM' button.
expected_result: The user can easily log in using their Facebook credentials.

title: Login with Facebook - Data Persistence Test
test_steps: Log out of the Drug Index app. | Reopen the app. | Click on the Facebook login prompt. | Click on the 'CONTINUE AS SAM' button.
expected_result: The user is logged into the Drug Index app using their Facebook credentials.

title: Login with Facebook - Navigation Test
test_steps: Open the Drug Index app. | Click on the Facebook login prompt. | Click on the 'CONTINUE AS SAM' button. | Navigate to another screen in the app. | Return to the Facebook login prompt. | Click on the 'CONTINUE AS SAM' button.
expected_result: The user is logged into the Drug Index app using their Facebook credentials.
